prompt: Exporta las unidades generadas a DOCX. Necesito el texto del alumno y la guia docente como archivos separados.
expected_behavior: Reads brand-config.json for styling (or uses JM Labs defaults)
Collects all units from units/ directory
Generates texto alumno DOCX with cover, TOC, all units, page breaks
Generates guia docente DOCX with planning tables, DUA boxes, rubrics
Saves both files to exports/ directory
Reports file sizes and structure summary

prompt: Genera el DOCX pero usa los colores de la editorial Prolipa, no los defaults de JM Labs.
expected_behavior: If not found, asks user for color tokens
Applies custom branding to headings, tables, and cover
Reports which brand config was applied

prompt: Export only the teacher guide to DOCX — I don't need the student text right now.
expected_behavior: Reads guides/ directory for teacher guide content
Generates only guia docente DOCX (not texto alumno)
Includes planning tables, methodological orientations, DUA boxes
